data.title: 国际服活动复刻「Bunny Chasers on Board」
data.summary: [Event Update Notice] Time to board the cruise ship alongside the C&C team in bunny girl outfits! No
data.body:
[Event Update Notice]

Time to board the cruise ship alongside the C&C team in bunny girl outfits!
No, Sensei, they're wearing the outfits, not you.

🗓️Event Period: 4/11(Tue) After Maintenance–4/18 (Tue) 1:59 AM (UTC)
